body.title: Validate code_ref before storing cloud-extracted PROCEDURAL habits
body.result: code_ref validation added to openrouter_reasoner.py ~line 245: extracts tool name from code_ref, checks registry.get(), logs CODE_REF_INVALID and skips if not found. Prevents phantom habits that fire-and-error every turn. Also committed primitives.json v2 (T-primitive-survey, 66 new primitives). Commit 823109c.
body.description: openrouter_reasoner.py ~line 245: code_ref stored without checking the function exists. Fix: importlib validation before metadata[code_ref] = code_ref — skip and log if module missing or attr absent. Prevents phantom habits that fire and error on every matching turn.
